full_text:
Lü Gong 呂公
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Gong (呂公). A warrior of great strength, he killed Sun Jian but was killed by Cheng Pu. Lü Gong was affiliated with Liu Biao.
